flags.summary: In-state tuition at Covenant College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.8k → $42.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Covenant College fell 10% between 2006 and 2009 (64.1% → 57.6%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Covenant College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
